summary: Transition Morph Circle component for Remotion.
summaryZh: 适用于 Remotion 的圆形遮罩转场组件。

artifact.usageMarkdown: Copy `remotion/transition-morph-circle/src/TransitionMorphCircle.tsx` into your Remotion project, import `TransitionMorphCircle` and `transitionMorphCircleDefaultProps`, then register the composition.
artifact.agentPrompt: Add the Transition Morph Circle Remotion asset from remotionhub/remotionhub-assets at remotion/transition-morph-circle to my project. Preserve the exported TransitionMorphCircleProps API and register the TransitionMorphCircle composition with the default props.
